meanings.definition: rip off; ask an unreasonable price

examples: He prides himself on making it into law school
The chimneys were pluming the sky
The engine was pluming black smoke

meanings.definition: dress or groom with elaborate care
examples: She likes to dress when going to the opera

meanings.definition: having or covered with or abounding in plumes
having an ornamental plume or feathery tuft
(of a knight's helmet) having a decorative plume
